description: Corporate security policy mandates integrating OpManager with Active Directory and enforcing strict local password policies. A security specification document is located at ~/Desktop/security_hardening_spec.txt. Read this document and implement its requirements in OpManager. Navigate to the relevant Settings areas (e.g., General Settings -> Authentication for AD, and Security Settings or Password Policy for local rules) to add the new AD domain and update the local password and lockout policies. Application: http://localhost:8060 (admin/Admin@123).
